agents.name: Daniel Stillson
agents.title: Commercial Associate
agents.bio: Daniel Stillson is a driven commercial real estate professional at Gateway Real Estate Advisors, where he specializes in helping investors and owners navigate complex transactions across commercial and multifamily asset classes. With a sharp analytical approach and deep market knowledge, Daniel delivers results-driven strategies that maximize value for his clients at every stage of the deal process. His commitment to building lasting relationships and providing transparent, expert guidance makes him a trusted advisor in today's competitive investment landscape.
